personal.name: Oleksandr Brynzei
personal.title: Senior Front-End Developer
personal.heroDescription: Senior Front-End Developer with 6+ years delivering production React and TypeScript applications across distributed product teams. Experienced with AI-assisted development tools. Focused on performance and scalable architecture.

aboutBio.text: I build web applications that solve real business problems—not just polished interfaces. My focus is creating products that reduce operational costs, improve user experience, and help companies scale through thoughtful engineering, maintainable architecture, and measurable business outcomes.

impacts.title: Reduced operating costs
impacts.description: by replacing paid third-party plugins with custom in-house solutions, giving the client full ownership while lowering long-term expenses.

impacts.title: Increased platform adoption
impacts.description: that walks customers through the entire shipping and delivery process, making the platform easier to use and increasing customer adoption.

impacts.title: Reduced support workload
impacts.description: that cut customer support requests by 50% and reduced negative reviews by one-third, giving users better visibility into their deliveries.

impacts.title: Improved operational efficiency
impacts.highlight: Developed a real-time resource monitoring system
impacts.description: that helped teams identify and resolve urgent operational needs faster, increasing overall productivity by 20%.

impacts.title: Increased revenue
impacts.highlight: Built a calendar-based subscription pricing dashboard
impacts.description: that enabled better pricing decisions and supported a 10% increase in service package revenue.

skills.description: A toolkit honed through real-world projects. Every category below represents tools I reach for daily.

items.description: Leveraging AI tools to accelerate software development, improve code quality, and enhance engineering productivity
Core technologies used for front-end development
Libraries and tools for form handling and validation
Tools for testing and continuous integration
Libraries used for building user interfaces
Professional competencies developed through leading projects, collaborating across teams, and delivering high-quality software

experience.description: A timeline of roles, responsibilities, and the impact I've had along the way.

items.title: Senior React Front-End Developer
description: Engineered core product features with React, TypeScript (strict), Zustand, React Hook Form, Zod, TailwindCSS, and Radix UI, reducing data-entry errors through Zod schema validation and conditional branching.
Built a dynamic form builder with custom fields, e-signatures, and conditional branching, cutting data-entry errors and manual processing overhead significantly.
Integrated Clerk for authentication and RBAC, hardening access-control flows while keeping the codebase maintainable.
Participated in agile ceremonies, conducted code reviews, and collaborated with Design and Back-End teams to ship features on schedule.

items.title: Lead Front-End Engineer
description: Led a large-scale codebase refactor, migrating the bundle pipeline to Vite and applying strict TypeScript, cutting build times and improving runtime performance.
Scaled the platform for higher concurrent users by introducing TanStack Query caching, row virtualization, and server-side pagination, improving performance on the most-trafficked views.
Built and governed a 100+ component design system with Chakra UI and Storybook, cutting time-to-feature and establishing consistent UI standards across the engineering team.
Owned code review culture and CI quality standards, mentoring junior and mid-level engineers through structured feedback and pair programming.

items.title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Built a delivery photo-verification module, improving order accuracy and supporting logistics operations end-to-end.
Introduced multi-theme React components with SSR, integrating Airtable and Mailjet to cut customer-service inquiries.
Delivered a multilingual, responsive interface with RBAC, boosting user engagement and improving accessibility.
Automated operational dashboards and email notifications via CRON jobs, eliminating hours of manual monitoring effort each week.

projects.description: A curated set of recent projects, each one shaped by collaboration, constraints, and craft.

items.title: PsychAssist
items.description: An AI-powered platform that helps psychologists draft clinical assessment reports using their own voice and terminology. Built the React/TypeScript frontend with OpenAI API integration, enabling psychologists to generate assessment reports in minutes rather than hours.

items.title: Circle.Help
items.description: A social platform connecting people who need help with volunteers ready to give it. Built the real-time matching interface with React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Socket.io, enabling instant coordination between requesters and volunteers.

items.title: Circle of Toys
items.description: A donation platform where people send toys directly to children in need. Built the end-to-end donation flow with React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Stripe, streamlining the process from donor to recipient.

items.title: Podly
items.description: A research tool that helps print-on-demand sellers find trending products and check trademarks. Built the data-intensive search and analysis interface with React, TypeScript, Node.js, and GraphQL, enabling sellers to identify profitable products faster.

items.title: Mengantar
items.description: A shipping platform for Indonesian sellers with COD delivery, tracking, and discounted rates. Built the full-stack logistics interface with React, Express.js, MongoDB, and REST API, processing shipments with real-time tracking and cash-on-delivery support.

education.description: Academic milestones and the credentials that shaped my technical foundation.

items.institution: Admiral Makarov National University of Shipbuilding
Institute of Engineering, National University of Zaporizhzhya

testimonials.description: What collaborators and clients have said about working with me.

items.quote:
I worked with Oleksandr on the Circle.Help and Circle of Toys projects at RULIAD. He is a very responsible developer and someone you can always rely on.
Oleksandr is open to discussions, always willing to share his ideas and offer his own perspective. He never completed tasks just for the sake of ticking a box. Whenever he noticed that something was inefficient, wasn't working properly, or could be done in a better way, he would speak up and suggest an alternative.
He was easy to work with because he cared not only about his own part of the work, but also about the overall result of the project.
Oleksandr is a strong developer and a genuinely pleasant person to work with. I would be happy to work with him again as part of the same team.
items.name: Daryna Chepynoga
items.title: Head of Marketing

items.quote:
I worked with Oleksandr at Golden Team, but I've actually known him since university. He always works hard and likes learning new things. He isn't afraid to take on new challenges and is always looking for ways to improve.
Working with him is a great experience. He's a good team player, easy to communicate with, and always happy to discuss ideas and find the best solution. He often comes up with good technical ideas and turns them into real working features.
Oleksandr is someone you can rely on, and I'd be happy to work with him again
items.name: Anastasiia Nealova
items.title: Senior Full Stack Developer

items.quote:
I worked alongside Oleksandr while he was covering the Front-End Developer role, and it was a great experience.
What I value most about his work is his focus on results and his complete independence. He doesn't just pull tasks from the backlog; he genuinely thinks about how to improve the product. On top of his strong tech skills, Oleksandr is highly productive and proactive - if he spots a bottleneck or a problem in the code, he suggests a solution instead of waiting to be told what to do.
He is incredibly easy to work with and a great team player with zero ego. If you need a strong front-end developer who actually delivers and takes ownership, I highly recommend Oleksandr.
items.name: Max Skoryk
items.title: Product & Operational Lead | Strategic Operations & Systems Architecture

items.quote:
Working with Oleksandr at Ruliad was genuinely one of the most enjoyable collaborations I've had.
What I appreciated most was how easy it was to work together. Communication never felt like a blocker—it was part of the solution. Whenever something needed clarification or discussion, Oleksandr was always open to jumping on a quick call, aligning on the best approach, and moving forward. That mindset made even challenging tasks feel straightforward.
He is responsible, reliable, and always focused on achieving the best possible outcome rather than simply completing a task. You can tell he cares about the quality of his work, and it consistently shows in the final result.
Beyond his technical skills, Oleksandr brings a collaborative attitude that positively influences the whole team. He's the kind of developer who listens, shares ideas, welcomes feedback, and genuinely wants to build a better product - not just write code.
I'd be happy to work with Oleksandr again and can confidently recommend him to any team looking for a skilled Frontend Developer and a great teammate.
items.name: Anastasiya Levkevych
items.title: QA Engineer

items.quote: I had the pleasure of collaborating with Oleksandr as a frontend developer at RULIAD. We spent a lot of time together discussing and standardizing our component library, making sure design and development stayed aligned on how components should look, behave, and scale across the product. He was proactive about surfacing edge cases early and translating our designs into pixel-perfect, consistent UI which kept our design-to-dev handoff smooth and saved a lot of back-and-forth. Beyond the technical execution, he was reliable, communicative, and easy to work with under deadlines the kind of developer who makes a designer's job easier. I'd gladly collaborate with him again on any project that needs a developer who brings real attention to design detail.
items.name: Oleksii Dziubak
items.title: Design Engineer

items.quote:
I had the pleasure of managing Oleksandr as a Frontend Developer on a social network project dedicated to mutual assistance. As a Project Manager, I can confidently say that Oleksandr is a highly competent developer with exceptional self-organization and motivation.
He is hardworking, proactive, and consistently brings valuable ideas to the table. Thanks to his suggestions, our project workflows were continuously optimized and improved. Oleksandr didn't just write code; he always found interesting and effective solutions to complex technical challenges.
I highly recommend Oleksandr to any potential employer - he would be a tremendous asset to any engineering team.
items.name: Yura Aleksenko
items.title: Project Manager | Project Coordinator

contact.description: Have a project in mind, or just want to say hi? I'm always open to interesting conversations.
